summary: Summary: Speaker1 begins the interaction neutral, requesting registration; Speaker2 responds neutral with the required documentation list. Speaker1 expresses surprise at needing an original birth certificate, then becomes excited and frustrated while offering alternatives (driver's license, Social Security Number) and explaining why carrying originals is impractical. Speaker2 grows frustrated and surprised that this information wasn’t provided earlier, then shifts to anger and annoyance when refusing to make an exception. The exchange escalates into a heated confrontation with Speaker1 increasingly frustrated and Speaker2 angry; Speaker2 ultimately apologizes but cannot assist, leaving Speaker1 to leave and revisit the process later.
